name: 说服与修辞
subject: english
domain_name: 语言与表达 / Language in Use / Language in Use
curriculum_points: Students will be able to deconstruct the persuasive strategies employed in argumentative texts, evaluating the use of logical appeals (logos), emotional appeals (pathos), and ethical appeals (ethos).
Students will be able to analyse how texts seek to influence audience beliefs, attitudes, or behaviours, considering the interplay of argument, style, and context.

interactive_resources.note: 制作课件时在 search_url 搜索对应练习，获取 embed 代码嵌入
